scripts.build:web: tsc && vite build --mode web && node scripts/check-web-build-boundaries.mjs
scripts.gen:types: cargo run -p bindings-gen && cd ../.. && python3 scripts/web_catalog_artifact_contract.py emit --write
scripts.check:types: npm run check:web-catalog-artifact && npm run gen:types && git diff --exit-code -- src/generated/contracts.ts src/generated/known-canopi-keys.ts src/generated/canopi-design-format.ts src/generated/plant-filter-fields.ts src/generated/web-catalog-artifact.mjs src/generated/web-catalog-artifact.d.mts ../src/db/plant_filter_fields.rs
